Skill Path: Rhetoric

You have mastered the ability to impress people with words alone.

While developing your skills in Diplomacy you chose to focus specifically on Rhetoric, learning basic techniques.You gain the following trained feats: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.KpFetnUqTiweypZk]{Group Impression}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.6ON8DjFXSMITZleX]{No Cause for Alarm}.

This path focuses on @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{Make an Impression}.

Path Progression

  • Trained: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.KpFetnUqTiweypZk]{Group Impression}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.6ON8DjFXSMITZleX]{No Cause for Alarm}
  • Expert: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.cc8O47KFsODReoBe]{Glad-Hand}
  • Master: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.YgbcLfAEdi4xxvX5]{Evangelize}
  • Legendary: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.A0TNeMNvyY8QpmLz]{Legendary Negotiation}
